definition: The body as a lived and observable dimension of experience, especially in contemplative practice.
notes: The project prefers body as the plain default in contemporary English. Bodily frame can work in explanatory prose when the embodied aspect needs emphasis, but the entry should not be overloaded with later technical meanings not active in the immediate context.

context_rules.context: In most practical and doctrinal contexts
In explanatory prose where the embodied frame of practice needs emphasis
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when it improves the line.

example_phrases.translation: one remains observing the body in relation to the body

example_phrases.notes: Shows the term in one of the project's existing untranslated compounds.
